criteria.name: AI Capabilities
criteria.description: The extent and effectiveness of AI features within the app, such as automated enhancements, style transfers, or content generation.
criteria.sources: App feature descriptions, user reviews, expert analyses.

criteria.name: User Experience
criteria.description: The overall ease of use, interface design, and user satisfaction with the app.
criteria.sources: User reviews, usability studies, expert evaluations.

criteria.name: Feature Set
criteria.description: The range and versatility of tools and functionalities offered by the app.
criteria.sources: App feature lists, expert reviews, user feedback.

criteria.name: Performance
criteria.description: The speed, stability, and efficiency of the app during operation.
criteria.sources: Performance benchmarks, user reviews, expert analyses.

criteria.name: Cost
criteria.description: The affordability and value for money of the app, considering its pricing model and features offered.
criteria.sources: App pricing information, user reviews, expert evaluations.
